parameters.query: WITH upd AS (UPDATE auth_sessions SET last_used_at = NOW() WHERE token = $1 AND expires_at > NOW() RETURNING user_id) SELECT user_id FROM upd;

SELECT id, title, category, processes, description, criticality,
  CASE WHEN $1::vector IS NULL OR embedding IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE 1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) END AS sim
FROM kb_violations
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN $1::vector IS NULL OR embedding IS NULL THEN 2 ELSE (embedding <=> $1::vector) END) ASC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT v.title, v.category, v.processes, v.criticality, (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('type', m.type, 'name', m.name, 'description', m.description, 'effect', m.expected_effect)) FROM kb_violation_measure vm JOIN kb_measures m ON m.id = vm.measure_id WHERE vm.violation_id = $1) AS measures, (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('text', r.text, 'source', r.norm_ref)) FROM kb_violation_requirement vr JOIN kb_requirements r ON r.id = vr.requirement_id WHERE vr.violation_id = $1) AS requirements, (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('title', rk.title, 'criticality', rk.criticality)) FROM kb_violation_risk vrk JOIN kb_risks rk ON rk.id = vrk.risk_id WHERE vrk.violation_id = $1) AS risks FROM (SELECT 1) d LEFT JOIN kb_violations v ON v.id = $1;

INSERT INTO compliance_incidents (user_id, violation, description, control_object, criticality, risk_level, category, measures_json, report, residual_risk, check_results, status) VALUES ($1::integer, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb, $10, $11, 'draft') RETURNING id;

WITH ins AS (INSERT INTO kb_cases (violation_text, category, measures_json, justification, approved_by) VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4, $5::integer) RETURNING id), upd AS (UPDATE compliance_incidents SET status = 'approved' WHERE id = NULLIF($6, '')::integer AND user_id = $5::integer RETURNING id) SELECT (SELECT id FROM ins) AS id, (SELECT id FROM upd) AS incident_id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ String(($('Token result').first().json.result && $('Token result').first().json.result.violation) || ''), String(($('Token result').first().json.result && $('Token result').first().json.result.category) || ''), JSON.stringify(($('Token result').first().json.result && $('Token result').first().json.result.measures) || {}), 'Утверждено пользователем', $('Token result').first().json.user_id, String($('Token result').first().json.incident_id || '') ] }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, response: 'Кейс добавлен в базу знаний' }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT doc_name, section, doc_version, chunk_text,
  1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS sim
FROM kb_norms
WHERE $1::vector IS NOT NULL AND embedding IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
LIMIT 3;

SELECT id, violation, category, criticality, risk_level, residual_risk, status, to_char(created_at,'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI') AS created, report FROM compliance_incidents WHERE user_id = $1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50;

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i=>i.json).filter(r=>r&&r.id);
return [{ json: { ok:true, response:'ok', incidents: rows.map(r=>({ id:r.id, violation:r.violation, category:r.category, criticality:r.criticality, risk_level:r.risk_level, residual_risk:r.residual_risk, status:r.status, created:r.created, report:r.report })) } }];
